zh.lifeSummary: 當Larderina Gospatrick於大約1094年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾卡爾福利時，她的父親Alphonsus Gospatrick, Lord of Calverley25歲，母親Egeline Winifred Laity23歲。她與John Scot de Calverley, II結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1136年在英國越可爾享年43歲。

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Larderina Gospatrick was born about 1094, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Alphonsus Gospatrick, Lord of Calverley, was 25 and her mother, Egeline Winifred Laity, was 23. She married John Scot de Calverley, II. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1136, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Larderina Gospatrick est née environ 1094, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alphonsus Gospatrick, Lord of Calverley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Egeline Winifred Laity, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Scot de Calverley, II. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1136, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

Sie hat John Scot de Calverley, II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1136 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Larderina Gospatrickが約1094年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで生まれた時，父Alphonsus Gospatrick, Lord of Calverleyは25歳，母Egeline Winifred Laityは23歳であった。John Scot de Calverley, IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1136年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで43歳で死去した。

ko.Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바 던바
ko.lifeSummary: Larderina Gospatrick(이)가 대략 1094년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alphonsus Gospatrick, Lord of Calverley(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Egeline Winifred Laity(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 John Scot de Calverley, II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1136년 영국 요르크실르에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Larderina Gospatrick родилась около 1094 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Alphonsus Gospatrick, Lord of Calverley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Egeline Winifred Laity, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Scot de Calverley, II. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1136 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.
